hero.description: Travelers lose thousands of items every day across Seoul, Busan, and Jeju. Our local team navigates the language barrier and recovery process for you.
hero.payTag: Pay only when we find it

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step01Body: Fill out a quick 30-second form with what you lost and where. It's free.
howItWorks.step02Body: Our team contacts Lost112, police stations, subway operators, bus companies, and taxi services — all in Korean so you don't have to.
howItWorks.step03Body: We email you as soon as your item is located, usually within 24-48 hours.
howItWorks.step04Body: Pay ${amount} to get the exact location, contact info, and English pickup instructions. Need delivery? We handle that too.

testimonials.title: Trusted by travelers
testimonials.subtitle: Real stories from people who got their belongings back.
testimonials.sarahQuote: I left my passport at a restaurant in Myeongdong. They found it within 6 hours. Lifesaver!
testimonials.kenjiQuote: Lost my wallet on the KTX to Busan. I was already back in Japan when they located it and shipped it to me.
testimonials.emmaQuote: My phone fell out on the subway. I had no idea how to use Lost112 in Korean. They handled everything.
testimonials.lucasQuote: Found my camera bag that I left at Incheon Airport in under 24 hours. Worth every dollar.

aboutUs.title: Who we are
aboutUs.body: We're a Seoul-based team of bilingual Koreans who help foreigners navigate Korea's lost and found system. We speak fluent Korean and English, and we know exactly how to work with Lost112, police stations, transit authorities, and taxi companies. Since Korea's lost item recovery system is almost entirely in Korean, most foreigners give up before even trying. That's where we come in.

pricing.title: Simple, fair pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. You only pay when we actually find your item.
pricing.recoveryPriceSubtext: → ${amount} only when we find your item
pricing.recoveryPriceNote: Free to start. No card needed.
pricing.shippingNoteBold: Shipping costs are calculated after we locate and assess your item.
pricing.shippingNoteBody: We'll send you an exact quote before any shipment — no surprises. Customs duties and import taxes are the recipient's responsibility. All prices in USD.
pricing.paymentMethodsTitle: We accept PayPal, Visa, Mastercard, and Apple Pay

bottomCTA.title: Ready to get your item back?

shippingGuide.title: Fast EMS shipping to Japan
shippingGuide.subtitle: Korea Post EMS reaches most of Japan in 2–3 business days, with full tracking and a clear customs trail. Here's what to expect.
shippingGuide.point1Body: EMS Premium from Seoul to Tokyo / Osaka / Fukuoka typically lands in 2–3 business days. Standard EMS adds 1–2 days.
shippingGuide.point2Body: Korea Post → Japan Post tracking is unified. You see every scan from pickup to your door.
shippingGuide.point3Body: We declare the item value honestly on the customs form. Personal items under the duty-free threshold usually clear without paperwork on your end.
shippingGuide.point4Body: EMS includes basic loss/damage coverage. We can add declared-value insurance on request — no extra charge from us.

lostFoundExplainer.title: How Korean lost & found actually works
lostFoundExplainer.paragraph1: Korea's lost-and-found system is excellent at the storage step. Police, transit, and hotels log items diligently, and the national Lost112 database is genuinely comprehensive — but it's all in Korean, and the procedures vary by venue.
lostFoundExplainer.paragraph2: For a Japanese traveler back home, that means: phone calls in Korean, no English (let alone Japanese) staff at smaller venues, and shipping logistics nobody at the venue is responsible for handling.
lostFoundExplainer.paragraph3: We close that gap. We make the calls in Korean, confirm with you in your language, retrieve the item, package it, and put it on EMS to your address. Each case stays with the same handler from start to finish.

shippingMap.title: We ship to wherever home is
shippingMap.subtitle: Items recovered in Korea, delivered to over 30 countries. EMS, EMS Premium, and express options (DHL/FedEx/UPS) available based on your speed and budget.
shippingMap.region1Example: USA, Canada — typically 5–7 business days via EMS
shippingMap.region2Example: UK, Germany, France — typically 6–10 business days
shippingMap.region3Example: Australia, New Zealand — typically 5–8 business days
shippingMap.region4Example: Japan, Singapore, Taiwan — typically 2–4 business days

supportTrust.title: No translation barrier. No surprise fees.
supportTrust.point1Body: Every email, every status update, every customs question — answered in clear English by the same handler your case is assigned to.
supportTrust.point2Title: Korean is our problem, not yours
supportTrust.point2Body: We make the calls, send the polite Korean follow-ups, and translate the venue's instructions for you. You never need to learn Lost112's interface.
supportTrust.point3Body: Pay directly in USD via PayPal. No FX guesswork, no hidden conversion fees, full PayPal buyer protection.
